system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is James Kim. I placed an order recently, but due to some life changes, I no longer need several of the items—specifically the hiking boots, watch, keyboard, charger, jacket, and running shoes. If it’s not possible to cancel just those items, I’m okay with cancelling the whole order. Could you please help me with this? My email is james.kim1995@example.com. Thank you.

I'm here to help you with your order. However, I need to verify your account before proceeding. Could you please confirm your zip code as well? This will help me locate your order and assist you further.
Of course, I understand. My zip code is 97214. Please let me know if you need any other information. Thank you for helping me with this.

I'm currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your account information. To ensure your request is handled properly, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
I'm currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your account information. To ensure your request is handled properly, I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
